title: Convert intermediate variable chain to pipe (TextProcessor.slugify/1)
prompt: Refactor MyApp.TextProcessor.slugify/1 from test_fixtures/intermediate_vars.ex into a single pipe pipeline. The current function assigns four intermediate variables (a, b, c, d) then returns d. Rewrite as a `|>` pipeline starting from the `title` argument and ending with the final result. Output only the `slugify/1` function inside `defmodule MyApp.TextProcessor do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Canonical intermediate-var → pipe rewrite. Single function, no judgment required.
